steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The goal is to describe the research METHODOLOGY—how the study was designed and conducted (experimental structure, sample sizes, comparison groups)—not the research question or the findings.

steps.title: Match the methodology to the choice
steps.content: Choice B directly describes the experimental structure: two groups of 120 seeds each, one ingested by bats and one as a control. The other choices either state the research question (C) or report findings from the data (A and D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
